document.title: Detector(자사_1G)구매_20191018.xlsx
document.documentType: Detector BOM, material purchase cost, and model cost analysis spreadsheet
document.revisionOrVersion: S4335-W_R1 and S4335-WV_R1 referenced; FPC-MAIN FPC Ver 5.0 referenced

sourceSummary.oneLine: Spreadsheet chunk lists detector BOM parts, suppliers, specifications, MOQ-based purchasing costs, panel cost assumptions, and model-level totals for S4335-W, S4335-WV, S4343-W, and HAD1717 variants.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/DMR design and purchasing traceability by documenting part codes, component specifications, suppliers, material costs, MOQ assumptions, panel sourcing, PBA processing costs, and model cost totals.
keyPoints: Model-level material totals are shown for S4335-W, S4335-WV, S4343-W, HAD1717MG, and HAD1717MC.
Panel sourcing assumptions include INX/Abyz for 4335 and BOE for 4343, with CsI deposition cost entries.
Safety and compliance-related component specs include UL94V-0 harness material, IEC60332-1 harness cable, UL power supply notation, and certified power cord markings.

entities.name: S4335-W
entities.evidence: Cost and BOM tables include S4335-W columns and many S4335-W part specifications.

entities.name: S4335-WV
entities.evidence: Model cost tables include S4335-WV and S4335-WV_R1 detector assembly entries.

entities.name: S4343-W
entities.evidence: Model cost tables and purchase lists include S4343-W, including BOE 1717 panel and S4343-W PBA entries.

entities.name: HAD1717MC
entities.evidence: Abyz detector material purchase section lists HAD1717MC and a model cost column for HAD1717MC.

entities.name: HAD1717MG
entities.evidence: Abyz detector purchase material list includes columns for HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.

entities.name: DAEAN ELECOM CO., LTD
entities.evidence: Listed as supplier for SMPS-2G_DETECTOR_POWER_BOX and PBA POWER.

entities.name: ELENTEC CO,. LTD.
entities.evidence: Listed as supplier for MI96-01305A BATTERY, SDR-C4335W Li-ion Polymer 3400mAh.

entities.name: SEONGJI INDUSTRIAL CO.,LTD
entities.evidence: Listed for multiple harness parts including HARNESS-SIGNAL IEC60332-1, 16P, L7000, 26AWG.

entities.name: ANALOG DEVICES
entities.evidence: Listed for IC ASIC-ROIC AD71140JCFZ and ADXL345 sensor.

entities.name: HIMAX TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED
entities.evidence: Listed for IC DRIVER GATE-GATE IC HX5090-ACS22D.

concepts.name: Detector BOM and purchasing cost calculation
concepts.evidence: Sections include material cost by model, MOQ-based first purchase cost, parts code tables, suppliers, unit prices, MOQ, and purchase classifications.

concepts.name: CsI deposition material and processing assumption
concepts.evidence: Deposition row states CsI 6kg and TlI 60g, four panels simultaneously, D-company material basis, and 20% loss reflected.

concepts.name: Panel sourcing and cost comparison
concepts.evidence: Panel analysis lists S4335-WV(GDX), S4343-W, and S4335-W with S-company, ABYZ panel, deposition, total, and difference amounts.

concepts.name: PBA processing cost basis
concepts.evidence: SMT(PBA) expected processing cost section states Exentechnic company unit-price basis and inspection cost not included.

concepts.name: Safety-marked power and harness components
concepts.evidence: Power cord spec includes CEE/EAC/ISC/SNI; SMPS power box spec includes UL; harness signal spec includes UL94V-0 and IEC60332-1.

evidence.claim: The spreadsheet includes model-level material cost totals for S4335-W, S4335-WV, S4343-W, HAD1717MG, and HAD1717MC.
evidence.evidenceText: Final cost table columns list S4335-W, S4335-WV, S4343-W, HAD1717MG, HAD1717MC, with total row values 5,864,847; 6,240,278; 6,016,514; 5,332,072; 4,813,772.

evidence.claim: S4335-W_R1 main PCB is specified as FR4, 8-layer, T1.2, 217x236.
The SDR-C4335W battery is a Li-ion polymer battery rated 3400mAh, 130x245x8.5mm, operating from 0 to 60C, with 380g mass.
The SMT PBA expected processing cost excludes inspection cost and is based on Exentechnic unit pricing.
evidence.evidenceText: Section title: 'SMT(PBA) 예상가공비_엑센테크닉社 단가 기준_검사비용 미 포함'.

evidence.claim: PBA expected processing average costs are 21,903 for PBA Interface Gate, 55,237 for PBA Interface Main, and 26,793 for PBA Interface ROIC.
evidence.evidenceText: SMT(PBA) table lists averages: PBA INTERFACE GATE 21,903; MAIN 55,237; ROIC 26,793; total average 103,933.

evidence.claim: CsI deposition assumptions include CsI 6kg, TlI 60g, four-panel simultaneous input, D-company material basis, and 20% loss reflected.
evidence.evidenceText: Deposition note: 'CsI 6kg, TlI 60g 4매 동시투입기준, D社 재료기준, LOSS 20% 반영'.

evidence.claim: The power supply for S4335-W is listed as an AC/DC 48W, AC220V 50-60Hz, DC16V unit with UL noted.
A power PBA is specified for S4335-W with 16V input and 5.8V, 30V, and -15V outputs.
evidence.evidenceText: MI92-02311A PBA POWER: 'S4335-W POWER PBA,INPUT(16V), OUTPUT(5.8V, 30V,-15V)'.

evidence.claim: Harness-signal part MI39-01557A uses micro coaxial cable with UL94V-0 material rating.
evidence.evidenceText: MI39-01557A HARNESS SIGNAL: 'S4335-W SHIELD CABLE A,Micro Coaxial Cable,UL94V-0,40C,L40,GRAY,42AWG'.

evidence.claim: Harness-signal part MI39-02330A references IEC60332-1 and is a 16P, L7000, 26AWG cable.
The power cord entry includes 250V, 10A and CEE/EAC/ISC/SNI markings.
The shock indicator component is specified to activate at 19 to 30 inches and 100G.
The WiFi antenna PCB specifications include 2.45/5.4GHz operation and gain values.
The IC ASIC-ROIC AD71140JCFZ is used for S4343-W and specified as 270/50, 5V, 0 to 70C, COF, tray.
The Gate IC HX5090-ACS22D is specified as COF line type with 40, 520, 68um and 40.24mm x 23mm dimensions.
evidence.evidenceText: MI13-01009A IC DRIVER GATE-GATE IC: 'HX5090-ACS22D,COF,LINE,40,520,68um,40.24mm X 23mm'.

evidence.claim: The Abyz detector purchase section lists HAD1717MC with a detector purchase quantity of 5 and excludes RO/Gate IC because existing stock is used.
evidence.evidenceText: Abyz section: '구분,,HAD1717MC'; '디텍터 구매 수량,,5'; note 'RO,Gate IC 제외(재고분 사용)'.
evidence.pageTarget: Chunk 6 - Abyz detector material purchase calculation

evidence.claim: Abyz detector panel purchase quantity is costed as 2,384,640 won per panel times five panels, with note of $1840 per panel, 8% customs duty, and 1200 exchange rate.
evidence.evidenceText: Panel row: 'Panel 구매 수량,"2,384,640원/1枚"," 11,923,200 "' and note '$1840/1枚, 관세 8%, 1200원 환율'.
evidence.pageTarget: Chunk 6 - Abyz detector material purchase calculation

evidence.claim: The first-generation Samsung material purchase calculation estimates a grand total of 131,018,078 won.
evidence.evidenceText: Section '◆ 1세대 삼성 자재 구매 금액 산출' shows Grand Total '131,018,078'.
evidence.pageTarget: Chunk 6 - 1세대 삼성 자재 구매 금액 산출

reviewFlags.reason: Chunk is a partial spreadsheet extract, so sheet names, workbook-level metadata, approvals, and complete column headers may be absent.
Several cost cells contain spreadsheet errors such as #VALUE! and #REF!, limiting confidence in derived purchase totals where those cells are referenced.
The content is primarily BOM and purchasing evidence; no regulatory submission, certificate number, or authority approval claim appears in this chunk.
